final:
// // This module performs a 3x3 convolutional filter operation on an input matrix with a given filter value.
module conv_3x3 (
    input [7:0] pixel00, input [7:0] pixel01, input [7:0] pixel02,
    input [7:0] pixel10, input [7:0] pixel11, input [7:0] pixel12,
    input [7:0] pixel20, input [7:0] pixel21, input [7:0] pixel22,
    input [7:0] filter,
    output reg [15:0] result
);

    always @(*) begin
        result = (pixel00 + pixel01 + pixel02 +
                  pixel10 + pixel11 + pixel12 +
                  pixel20 + pixel21 + pixel22) * filter;
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs a 3x3 convolutional filter operation on an input matrix with a given filter value.
